title: elsota major
intro: Elsota major, also known as Elsholtzia ciliata, is a perennial plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion, due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. Elsota major can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, such as colds, flu, and digestive problems.
